title.purpose: Game cards, queue items, feed rows, and compact repeated objects.

body.purpose: Descriptions, recommendation explanations, and journal text.

label.purpose: Uppercase metrics, compact status labels, metadata, and reason captions.

shadows.name: icon-image-separation
shadows.purpose: Separates small rating icons from dense card content.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: Default panel, card, input, and action style.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Border and background state transitions for cards, rows, and inputs.

motion.name: card-state
motion.purpose: Game-card border and background hover transitions.

motion.name: progress-width
motion.purpose: Progress and status bar width changes.

rules: Let game artwork carry emotion; interface color clarifies state.
Use Burnished Ember for primary actions, active selections, focus, and recommendation intelligence.
Use tonal layering instead of panel shadows.
Keep product type compact; avoid marketing-scale typography on authenticated screens.
Use lightweight inline data visuals instead of heavy chart scaffolding.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact ember action used once per section or header.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 42px; padding: 0 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: #d4674d; color: #fff1ec; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #b9543e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Game Card
components.description: Media-first card for catalog, library, and recommendation browsing.
components.html:
Game Title

2024 - RPG - PC
components.css: .ds-game-card { overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--mantine-color-dark-4); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--mantine-color-dark-7); transition: border-color 160ms ease, background 160ms ease; } .ds-game-card:hover { border-color: var(--mantine-color-dark-3); background: #171b27; } .ds-game-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #b9543e; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-game-media { min-height: 220px; background: var(--mantine-color-dark-5); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); } .ds-game-body { padding: 12px; } .ds-game-body h3 { margin: 0; color: var(--mantine-color-gray-0); font-size: 0.96rem; line-height: 1.45rem; } .ds-game-body p { margin: 6px 0 0; color: var(--mantine-color-dimmed); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

components.name: Compact Input
components.description: Search and select control styling for filters and panel controls.
components.css: .ds-input { min-height: 42px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid var(--mantine-color-dark-4); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--mantine-color-dark-6); color: var(--mantine-color-gray-0); font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; box-shadow: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease, background 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--mantine-color-gray-5); } .ds-input:focus { outline: 0; border-color: #b9543e; }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: Compact dashboard metric with small uppercase label, tabular value, and quiet icon well.
components.css: .ds-metric { position: relative; overflow: hidden; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid var(--mantine-color-dark-4); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--mantine-color-dark-7); transition: border-color 150ms ease, background 150ms ease; } .ds-metric:hover { border-color: var(--mantine-color-dark-4); background: #171b27; } .ds-metric-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; color: var(--mantine-color-dimmed); font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-metric strong { display: block; color: #e97d61; font-size: 1.6rem; line-height: 1.1; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-metric small { display: block; margin-top: 6px; color: var(--mantine-color-dimmed); font-size: 0.7rem; }
